seo.title: Normalize — Turn messy files into clean data
seo.description: Upload a CSV, Excel, or JSON file. Normalize samples your data and suggests how to interpret it — column types, formats, and null tokens. You confirm and adjust per column, set output preferences, and download a clean dataset as CSV, JSON, or Parquet.
seo.ogTitle: Normalize — Turn messy files into clean data
seo.ogDescription: Upload a CSV, Excel, or JSON file. Normalize suggests how to interpret your data — you confirm, adjust per column, and export as CSV, JSON, or Parquet.

headline: Turn messy files into clean data.

upload.title: Upload
upload.desc: Bring a CSV, Excel, or JSON file into Normalize.

confirm.title: Confirm structure
confirm.desc: Normalize detects column types, tokens, and formats. You adjust how the data should be understood.

output.title: Output settings
output.desc: Choose how the normalized data should be produced: format, date styles, tokens, and other rules.

download.title: Download
download.desc: Export the normalized dataset as CSV, Excel, JSON, or Parquet.

waitlist.heading: Be the first to try it.
waitlist.description: Leave your email and we'll reach out as soon as access opens.
waitlist.success: You're on the list — we'll be in touch.
